elements.text:
You are at a quiet restaurant with a lot of your family members for dinner. While taking a drink of your water, you accidently drop the glass on the floor and it shatters.

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I ask if I can help clean up.
I want to leave the restaurant, but stay and have a good time.
I apologize to the wait staff and thank them for their help.
When the server comes, I blame the spill on another family member.
I want to cry, but take a deep breath and remind myself that this happens.
